blockers.blocked_by: Android code realification is proceeding in clean worktrees and integration compile passes, but device-side per-route runtime verification is blocked by Oppo shell-launch behavior: adb explicit starts of the fdroid debug ComposeRouteHarnessActivity are bounced back to launcher after startup. Launcher-path startup still works, so the remaining blocker is a robust debug entrypoint or manual launcher-driven route verification for page-level acceptance.

mainline.policy: Use the strict A/B/C/D page reality standard. Audit is complete: 46 pages audited, A=0, B=11, C=17, D=18. Rework is now active: P0/P1 slices compile in clean worktrees; P2 Core was accepted into integration; P2 Extended screen rendering is being switched from hardcoded pseudo-business copy to uiState-driven rendering. Main remaining risk is route-level runtime evidence on the Oppo device, not audit or write-scope overlap.
